'''Kerig'En''' was a celestial body in the [[Kerig'En system/Legends|Kerig'En system]],<ref name="Polyhedron" /> a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Alara Fax]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was an entrepreneur as well as a former [[SoroSuub Business Academy]] attendee and criminal and who was thirty-six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old by some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Kerig'En.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kerig'En was introduced in "[[Adversaries: Characters for the Star Wars: New Republic Campaign]]," a [[roleplaying game]] source article authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[Polyhedron 97|ninety-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine in [[July]] [[1994]].<ref name="Polyhedron" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Kerig'En [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-17.<ref name="TEA Kerig'En" />
